Lesson 候选

  1. Before starting slow work or work involving tools, network calls, or delegation dispatch, send a short acknowledgement first, then proceed with the slow operation. skill_ready / safe / agent-runtime, dispatch, network, tooling
    source-inventory://openclaw/.praxisbase/staging/experience-envelopes/experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-8107f53d4.json#src_openclaw_praxisbase-staging-experience-envelopes-experience-openclaw-answer-bot-sha256_json_0
  2. 当用户反馈 bot、交互环境 down、停止回复或无响应，且不是明确计费/额度问题时，可按“控制台自动修复→验证→失败后升级”的路径处理。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/91722693753b0bb88c792633ce6b32701a4c9f6c2754b0e2b1b6cd81c9d13fc3#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-19c2eeefa_4 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/233eb223a7224ea763915948cb376589ba2d36d43ba84f99704fb4fb8e3bc319#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-8107f53d4_2
  3. 当新用户或刚授权用户遇到 access-not-configured、pairing prompt 或权限配置异常时，应按授权/配对问题处理，而不是当作模型或业务逻辑失败。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/db942141c04813da000316c8bb03a726610a386f8c89e5184512d63912fbcbe9#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-f7aee701a_3 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/7d903ce59380e64c1fa8e0c3f29210272282aa4bc42e6b55307c09af1f2e51dc#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-5535ee36f_16
  4. 群聊中 bot 静默不一定表示集成没收到消息；应同时检查触发资格、会话状态、网关健康和最近分发活动。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/578c93fed49000856bedd6f4509320f98bfd5689fa2a77d8b6e288ff14dc4d94#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-14edce26a_18 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6d26893d8543d3c19d5418337825924ef91012347381c7ad28429e59fc1b0b99#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-f1d3f2e21_17
  5. 当消息平台集成异常且实例不是因计费停机时，可用插件启用、集成更新和实例重启作为首轮修复步骤。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/233eb223a7224ea763915948cb376589ba2d36d43ba84f99704fb4fb8e3bc319#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-8107f53d4_2 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/db942141c04813da000316c8bb03a726610a386f8c89e5184512d63912fbcbe9#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-f7aee701a_3
  6. 模型切换成功提示不一定代表默认模型被持久更改；agent 默认模型和 sub-agent 默认模型可能覆盖会话级选择。 skill_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/8c351e4b90f57741f7851c6edb2b4c40a799566267c538a9b94fe8e398f04417#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-dbfb119fc_9 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/b9e879dee5e970e643cce67f6a587350eacae6a38c4a851400cb67d52f447384#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-745fa543d_14
  7. 跨无关用途复用同一聊天机器人身份或配置，可能导致漏回复、重复回复或过度参与；应隔离 bot identity/configuration。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/61942ecbfdd359d57f876243bf63b30b3033cca5b2f66a65cf6ce557281c9fa0#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-e1db2413e_10 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6136a86e1d1ca4e539c4df57f5098a0abe5ee8314bfeb016d901be527d685a77#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-98477e0c8_19
  8. 定时任务返回 client errors 且目标 primary session 解析失败时，可靠绕过方式是删除失败任务并用 isolated-session delivery、agent-turn style payload 和 explicit delivery configuration 重建。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/2a5d25f88e3247b1869800eacafb3244037010e464723e3fd77bb16901d6b8ab#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-92320b389_7 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6136a86e1d1ca4e539c4df57f5098a0abe5ee8314bfeb016d901be527d685a77#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-98477e0c8_19

待审核经验候选

AI 生成的 wiki 草稿正在等待审核。稳定的 kb/ 文件在提升前不会改变。

6

  1. 长耗时代理工作前先发送 ACK

    当 OpenClaw 代理即将执行工具调用、网络请求、任务派发或其他长耗时工作时，先发送简短确认 ACK，再开始慢操作，避免用户误以为系统无响应。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/ack-timing-before-long-running-agent-work.md
    类型
    pitfall
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/233eb223a7224ea763915948cb376589ba2d36d43ba84f99704fb4fb8e3bc319
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.93
    审核原因
    canonical_relationship
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    该页面是操作时序规则，不证明任何具体工具、网络或 dispatch 故障根因。; ACK 只能表示请求已收到或正在处理，不能表示任务已成功完成。; 未包含凭证、令牌、cookie、认证头或私钥。; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope
    Suggested links
    agents-can-mislead-users-if-failures-are-reported-as-successful-outcomes Agents can mislead users if failures are reported as successful outcomes. entity_overlap
    openclaw-dispatch-routing-failures OpenClaw dispatch routing failures entity_overlap
    openclaw-dispatch-routing-failures OpenClaw dispatch routing failures entity_overlap
    openclaw-slack-replay-and-post-deploy-stability-failures OpenClaw Slack replay and post-deploy stability failures entity_overlap
    Merge candidates
    ACK timing before long-running agent work kb/known-fixes/ack-timing-before-long-running-agent-work.md same_title_or_slug, entity_overlap
    Relationship reasons
    entity_overlap, same_title_or_slug

  2. 机器人不回复或交互环境 down/unresponsive 的自动修复路径

    当用户反馈 OpenClaw bot、交互环境或实例停止回复，且没有明确 billing、quota、payment 原因时，按“控制台自动修复→原会话验证→失败后升级平台支持”处理；避免在已执行 script-based repair 和 AI-based repair 后反复要求用户重复修复。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/down-unresponsive.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/233eb223a7224ea763915948cb376589ba2d36d43ba84f99704fb4fb8e3bc319
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.93
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源只有一条，流程可信但覆盖面有限；遇到明确计费、额度或付款问题时不要套用。; 未提供具体控制台按钮名称或状态字段，执行时需按当前 OpenClaw 控制台界面适配。; 不要收集或记录用户凭据、token、cookie、auth header、私钥等敏感信息；升级时仅附实例标识、症状、已执行修复和验证结果。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope

  3. 使用受支持的包管理流程安装可复用技能

    当可复用 review skill 通过 plugin 风格命令安装失败时，不要继续沿用不受支持的插件安装路径；应切换到受支持的 package-manager 工作流。验证以安装命令成功退出、技能在 agent runtime 中可用为准。交互式授权超时导致的文档生成失败不应误判为技能安装失败；恢复检查任务若已发送过通知，静默且幂等是可接受结果。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/install-review-skill-via-package-manager.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/f3544b734e702d241ea5feb3736e4237030617d2d5df62a99d4d4fb594989f76
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.68
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据未提供具体 package-manager 命令、路径或产品版本，因此正文避免编造命令。; 交互式授权细节已泛化处理，未包含任何令牌、凭据、cookie、auth header 或私钥。; 该页面适用于技能安装流程选择与验证，不应扩展为通用授权修复指南。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope

  4. scheduled-job 失败且 primary session 解析失败时重建为 isolated-session delivery

    当 scheduled-job 返回 client errors、定时通知未发送，并伴随目标 primary session 解析失败时，优先删除失败任务，并用 isolated-session delivery、agent-turn style payload、explicit delivery configuration 重新创建任务。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/scheduled-job-failure-client-errors-primary-session.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/2a5d25f88e3247b1869800eacafb3244037010e464723e3fd77bb16901d6b8ab
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.93
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来自单条成功经验，适用于 primary session 解析失败相关的 scheduled-job client errors；不应泛化到所有定时任务失败。; 未提供具体控制台路径或命令，执行时需使用当前环境支持的 scheduled job 管理工具完成删除与重建。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope

  5. 自动修复失败、机器人无响应与聊天连接器故障的处理规则

    当脚本修复和 AI 修复均已失败时，不要重复执行同类修复，应升级给对应平台支持角色。对机器人疑似无响应，先确认后端工具调用是否仍在运行或延迟，再必要时切换模型。对聊天连接器故障，检查聊天插件启用状态、重启服务，并验证连接器身份解析、WebSocket 就绪、服务健康和集成配置。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/wiki.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/233eb223a7224ea763915948cb376589ba2d36d43ba84f99704fb4fb8e3bc319
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.68
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic; duplicate_source_hash
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来自单一来源，未提供具体命令、日志样例或平台角色名称；执行时需结合本地运行手册确认健康检查入口和升级对象。; 不要将“切换模型”作为替代后端状态检查的第一步；否则可能造成重复请求或掩盖长耗时工具调用。; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope

  6. 隔离不同用途的 Bot 身份与配置，避免漏回复、重复回复或过度参与

    跨无关工具或 agent 复用同一聊天机器人身份或配置，可能导致 bot 漏回复、重复回复、普通消息也被错误参与处理，或多个 agent 行为相互干扰。应为无关用途使用独立 bot identity/configuration，明确触发条件，并检查 bot visibility。

    目标
    kb/pitfalls/bot-agent.md
    类型
    pitfall
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6136a86e1d1ca4e539c4df57f5098a0abe5ee8314bfeb016d901be527d685a77
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.93
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源为单条经验记录，适合作为操作性排障规则，但仍需结合实际 bot 平台配置验证。; 未包含具体平台的配置界面路径或命令；仅保留通用操作边界，避免编造实现细节。; 不适用于同一工具多会话的正常共享场景，也不替代认证、网络或服务宕机排查。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope
praxisbase review --auto praxisbase promote --auto praxisbase wiki build-site --json

知识页

  1. OpenClaw dispatch routing failuresknown_fix
  2. ACK timing before long-running agent workpitfall
  3. Agents can mislead users if failures are reported as successful outcomes.known_fix
  4. Actions on the wrong target machine or host can cause unsafe operational changes.procedure
  5. Case-sensitive database comparisons can miss logically equivalent values.procedure
  6. Changes can introduce regressions when not tested after modificationpitfall

高频特征

  1. openclaw:dispatch-routing-failure
